items.title: Trump's Board of Peace members pledge $7bn in Gaza relief
items.dek: Trump said it "looks like" Hamas will disarm, even though there are signs the group is regrouping.

items.title: US-Iran tension: Why Tehran may choose confrontation over 'surrender'
items.dek: The Iranian leadership is weighing up whether resisting US demands is the best option for its survival.
